This article is about Newcastle Disease, a viral infection affecting poultry, circulating across Europe—not about a restaurant or food establishment. As this is a livestock/agricultural health alert rather than food news, it's relevant to visitors mainly as a food safety matter: it may impact local poultry availability and prices at restaurants and markets in affected regions.
